title: TotemSound
description: This Minecraft mod lets you replace the default totem sound with a custom audio file up to ten seconds long.
body:
# TotemSound

A client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that allows you to replace the Totem of Undying pop sound with a custom local audio file directly in-game.

## Features

* **In-Game Menu:** Adds a new button to the pause menu to easily change the sound while playing.
* **Local Files:** Allows you to select a custom audio file directly from your PC using a file browser.
* **Time Limit:** The system automatically checks if the selected sound complies with the maximum limit of 10 seconds.
* **Restore Function:** Clicking "Restore Sound" immediately brings back the original vanilla totem sound.
* **Client-Side Only:** The mod only needs to be installed on the client and works perfectly on any multiplayer server.

## Installation

1. Install the **Fabric Loader** for Minecraft 1.21.1.
2. Download the mod file (`totemsound.jar`).
3. Place the file into your `%appdata%\.minecraft\mods` folder.
4. Launch the game using the Fabric profile.

## Usage

1. Open the pause menu (ESC) in-game.
2. Click the **Totem Sound** button.
3. Select your desired audio file on your PC **(It has to be a .wav file you can convert your sound on some websites for example https://cloudconvert.com/audio-converter )**.
4. Use a totem in the game to hear the new sound.
5. To get the original sound back, simply press **Restore Sound** in the pause menu.

---

**Author:** Petar  
**Platform:** Fabric (Minecraft 1.21.1)
